ogTitle: Maddens Plains vs Maffra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maddens Plains and Maffra.
heading: Maddens Plains vs Maffra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maddens Plains, New South Wales and Maffra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maffra has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Maddens Plains (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maddens Plains or Maffra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maddens Plains has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Maffra scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maddens Plains scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Maffra scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maddens Plains or Maffra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maffra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
